title: Diefault
description: 16x cute resoucepack. Enhanced the world with immersive visuals, and focused on improvements to the natural environment.*Optifine required*
body:
**Abstract:** Diefault is a project I started 7 years ago, intending to enhance and revitalize the vanilla gaming experience. To achieve this, Diefault has undergone an extensive overhaul of the vanilla textures and added a bunch of fancy details using OptiFine. It also applied lots of experimental features and has its own hand-drawn designs.

**Key Words:** 16x; Vanilla Enhancement; Biomes; Optifine; Experimental;

**If you like this resourcepack, please help me promote it. It really means a lot to me.**
# Features ([Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/diefault/gallery)) ## I.🍦Vanilla Contents ### i.Textures - Overhauled almost all block textures, especially natural blocks. - ~~Redesigned tools and most items.~~ _(need to rework)_ - Fresh new inventories, widgets, icons, even the vignette...and much more! - Changed some enemies into otherworldly creatures🪼
![forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k6jjDBZd/images/f4a181e7bb67f3ed2144852346f7cba986eb2773.png) ### ii.🪴Models - Focused on plants, giving every flower a cute model. (Double flowers WIP) ![Flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88ff84097f6ebe50aa440c1c532b53584d11f2b.png) ### iii.Texts - No idea why this entry appears in this list. ## II.Optifine ### i.🍄CTM - Connect&Random&Overlay
Added CTM to some main natural blocks, below is my personal favorite. ![mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k6jjDBZd/images/f6fefe026d990c7898831ad6ec4a95eae389c88a.png) ### ii.CEM - No idea why this entry appears in this list. ### iii.🎨Color Platte(ColorMap) - Biomes Color Palettes
Not only were the grass color and water color changed, but also the sky, fog, and even dirt color were introduced to create a colorful and vivid world! Check them in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/diefault/gallery)! - Light Maps
Slightly changed the lightmap. Dusk, dawn, and different weathers now have a more pleasant vibe. ## III.👁️Mod Supports - Fully support [_Beyond the Veil_](https://www.reddit.com/r/BeyondTheVeilMod/).（Will do a rework later, many things seem to be outdated）
Spoiler ![btv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d171fc35c13caea85c2d3e94f8ef9183f2440ea5.png)
## IV.Designs Such things should be prohibited.
Spoiler ![dolly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k6jjDBZd/images/10ca6123635d4ef130b9d8a98458735dd798fe27.png) ![miracle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k6jjDBZd/images/05dda34da23c095b09c8da1630283eb3bcfb867a.png)
# ❗Notice ## I.Usage - **IMPORTANT: MUST UNZIP BEFORE USE** - May not work well with Optifine shaders. - Please turn on all Optifine features to have a better experience. ## II.Issues - This is a WIP project, so it might be unstable and glitchy. - Please report bugs [here](https://github.com/fs200/resourcepacks). Or join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/WGgsgqJ8y2)
